unmatchedSentences.text: All of this while being able to collaborate with others instantaneously, so you've got ample time to focus on what really matters, like this gorgeous C view I'm going to have from my kitchen.

The sloping shape of the breakwater and the graded rock layers were designed so that incoming waves lose energy progressively rather than just hitting a vertical face that reduces scour around the base of the breakwater while protecting the reclaimed land and islands on the interior.

longSentences.text: The sloping shape of the breakwater and the graded rock layers were designed so that incoming waves lose energy progressively rather than just hitting a vertical face that reduces scour around the base of the breakwater while protecting the reclaimed land and islands on the interior.
